posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, quick update!

If you want to open your shared calendar to a specific view, this can now be done with Calendar Plus.

All views are supported:

  • Day view
  • Week view
  • List view
  • Month view
  • Year view

Set up your calendar share first, then see our release notes to learn how to configure.

An example:

To install, visit to the marketplace:
